meta.description: Daily 9 AM IST. Fetches v_digest_vendor_payments_due_7d (mig 085) and aggregates ALL due POs into ONE digest sent to 3 recipients in parallel: Finance head (= Vivek until Finance is hired) + Vinodh + Sridhar. Replaces the prior per-PO splitOut + fan-out that produced 4 sends per PO (hundreds of messages on busy days, blowing Meta's burst rate-limit). Aggregate inlines top 8 POs by ₹ then `+N more`, shows total outstanding ₹L, flags counts of high-value (>₹5L) + MSME POs. Empty result = no messages fire. When real Finance head is hired, FINANCE_HEAD_WHATSAPP env switches and Vivek stops getting these (intentional).
